# israel-nadlan-data-collector

Public-safe collector for Israeli locality reference data.

## Core layout

src/rent_collector/
  cli.py
  pipeline.py
  public_bundle.py
  provenance.py
  source_registry.py
  collectors/data_gov_il.py
  utils/locality_crosswalk.py
  utils/http_client.py
configs/
  pipelines/public_release.yaml
  sources/data_gov_il_locality_registry.yaml
data/
  locality_codes_seed.csv
docs/
tests/

## Active docs

- `README.md`: public repo scope and operator usage.
- `docs/source_policy.md`: public-safe source posture and allowed handling.
- `docs/output_model.md`: bundle artifact contract.
- `docs/provenance.md`: manifest and source inventory model.
- `docs/running.md`: CLI and validation flow.

## Boundaries

- Do not add Category-2 to Category-5 source handling here.
- Do not reference private repositories or internal-only workflows.
- Keep generated bundle artifacts under `data/public_bundle/`; do not track ad hoc output snapshots.
